description_long: This is a large, rectangular wooden table with a dark brown finish, featuring a broad, flat tabletop and sturdy, turned legs. The legs are connected by a horizontal stretcher near the base, adding both stability and a touch of traditional craftsmanship. The tabletop has a subtle border detail, giving it a refined and classic appearance. The wood grain is visible across the surface, suggesting a solid hardwood construction. The table's design is robust and utilitarian, suitable for communal or work-related activities in urban environments. Its overall aesthetic is timeless, blending well with both rustic and formal settings.
description: A large, dark brown rectangular wooden table with turned legs and a connecting stretcher, featuring a classic and sturdy design.
description_view_0: End-on view showing the narrow width of the tabletop and two turned legs with the stretcher visible below.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the tabletop, all four turned legs, and the horizontal stretcher connecting them.
description_view_2: Opposite end-on view, similar to view 0, showing the tabletop's narrow side and the leg structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, with the full tabletop, legs, and stretcher visible.
